auth.login_subtitle: Log in to resume your nutritional plan and adherence tracking.
auth.register_subtitle: Start your personalized nutritional journey today.
auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.reset_subtitle: Choose a strong password to protect your health data.
auth.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.error_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.forgot_success_msg: We sent a reset link to your email.

onboarding.step1_desc: This determines your caloric strategy and macro distribution. You can change it later from your profile.
onboarding.step2_desc: Used to calculate your BMI, BMR, and TDEE. The more accurate, the better your plan.
onboarding.step3_desc: The system will block incompatible foods automatically. You can always update these from your profile.
onboarding.step4_desc: Calculated from your physical data using the Mifflin-St Jeor formula.
onboarding.step5_desc: You can start with Basic for free and upgrade at any time.
onboarding.goal_weight_loss_desc: Caloric deficit · Fat loss · Sustainable progress
onboarding.sedentary_desc: Desk job, little or no exercise
onboarding.error_birthday_min_age: You must be at least 13 years old
onboarding.error_weight_range: Weight must be between 30 and 300 kg
onboarding.error_height_range: Height must be between 100 and 250 cm
onboarding.about_you_desc: We'll use this to calculate your BMI, BMR, and TDEE accurately.
onboarding.restrictions_desc: Select all that apply. The system will filter incompatible foods automatically.
onboarding.summary_desc: Calculated using the Mifflin-St Jeor formula based on your data.
onboarding.composition_why: This helps us distinguish muscle gain from fat gain so your progress is accurate.
onboarding.pant_size_disclaimer: Pant size gives an approximate conversion — expect ±2 cm variance.
onboarding.visual_disclaimer: This is a rough estimate. You can update your measurements later from Body Progress.

subscription.title: Choose your plan
subscription.subtitle: Unlock the full power of AI-driven nutrition. Cancel anytime.
subscription.desc_basic: Core tools to start tracking your nutrition today.
subscription.desc_premium: Everything you need, unlimited, for the committed.
subscription.feature_everything_basic: Everything included in the Basic Plan.
subscription.feature_everything_pro: Everything included in the Pro Plan.

profile.title: Profile & Settings
profile.home_city_hint: Used to detect when you are travelling and show local recommendations.
profile.weight_tooltip: Log your weight in Body Progress to keep this updated.

page_not_found.title: Page not found
page_not_found.content: The path {{ invalid_path }} is not valid.

dashboard.alert_at_risk_title: You've been off track for {{days}} days
dashboard.alert_at_risk_desc: Your nutritional plan needs attention. A preventive recommendation has been generated for you.
dashboard.alert_dropped_desc: Your reactivation plan is ready. Start small and build momentum.
dashboard.alert_recovered_desc: Great job returning to your plan. Keep the momentum going!
dashboard.calories_consumed_desc: out of a target of {{target}} kcal
dashboard.no_meals_desc: Your plan is ready. Start with something small — one meal is enough.
dashboard.streak_on_track_desc: consecutive days with a full log
dashboard.streak_at_risk_footer: Keep going to get back on track
dashboard.streak_dropped_footer: Your plan is ready when you are
dashboard.load_error: Could not load your data. Please try again.

nutrition.page_subtitle: Log your meals and track your macros in real time
nutrition.search_hint: Type a food name to search the nutritional database.
nutrition.select_portion_hint: Select a food item to configure the portion
nutrition.no_results: No results for "{{ query }}". Try a different name or add it manually.
nutrition.no_meals_banner_desc: Start by adding your first meal for this day.
nutrition.impact_approaching: Will reach {{percent}}% of your daily goal
nutrition.exceeded_warning: You have exceeded your goal. Consider a lighter dinner.
nutrition.restrictions_warning: Some results contain ingredients that match your active restrictions: {{ restrictions }}
nutrition.restricted_items_note: Restricted items are disabled. Only available items can be added.
nutrition.first_meal_hint: Add your first meal using the search below!
nutrition.goal_exceeded_alert: Daily goal exceeded — you consumed {{ kcal }} kcal over target.
nutrition.goal_met_alert: Daily goal met! All meals logged.
nutrition.base_info: Base: {{ size }}{{ unit }} · {{ calories }} kcal · P {{ protein }}g · C {{ carbs }}g · G {{ fat }}g
nutrition.restricted_description: This food contains {{ conflicts }}, which conflicts with your active dietary restriction.
nutrition.restricted_info_box: Active restriction: {{ restrictions }} · To modify, go to Profile → Dietary Restrictions.
nutrition.entry_read_only: This entry is older than 7 days and can no longer be edited

recommendations.subtitle_travel: Your current location is different from your usual area.
recommendations.subtitle_upgrade: Upgrade your plan to access context-sensitive recommendations
recommendations.subtitle_pro: Personalised recommendations based on your current location and weather
recommendations.gate_title: Contextual recommendations — Pro or Premium plan
recommendations.gate_desc: Weather-based suggestions, Automatic Travel Mode and the personalised recommendation engine are available from the Pro plan onwards.
recommendations.location_denied_msg: We don't have access to your location. Enable it to get weather-based recommendations and Travel Mode, or enter your city manually in the side panel.
recommendations.banner_travel_desc: Your current location is different from your usual area. We're showing you typical dishes from {{ city }} that match your profile and dietary restrictions.
recommendations.banner_hot_desc: Location detected automatically. We've suggested light, refreshing and hydrating options that match your profile.
recommendations.banner_cold_desc: Your location has been detected automatically. We've suggested some warming and comforting options that match your profile.
recommendations.intervention_title: Start small — day 1 of your return
recommendations.intervention_desc: We noticed you haven't been following your plan for {{ days }} days. For days 1–3, we're reducing your target to {{ kcal }} kcal to make it easier to return.
recommendations.preventive_desc: Your last {{ days }} day(s) were below your caloric target. Here's a simple suggestion to help you get back on track today.
recommendations.subtitle_travel_filtered: Filtered by your profile · Local weather: {{ temp }}°C · Travel mode active
recommendations.subtitle_filtered: Filtered by your {{ goal }} profile and active restrictions · {{ city }}, {{ country }}
recommendations.empty_state: No recommendations available. Adjust your filters or try a different location.
recommendations.travel_panel_subtitle: Your current location has been detected outside your usual area.
recommendations.travel_no_location: No location access. Enter your city to receive local recommendations.
recommendations.unrecognized_city: ⚠ City not recognized. Try a nearby major city like
recommendations.travel_at_home: Recommendations adapt automatically when you travel away from {{homeCity}}
recommendations.location_search_subtitle: Enter your city to receive local food recommendations.
recommendations.error_load_failed: Could not load recommendations. Please try again.

body_progress.page_subtitle: Weight, metrics, and body composition tracking
body_progress.stale_banner: Your last weight entry was {{ date }}. For accurate metrics, we recommend logging your current weight.
body_progress.chart_empty: Not enough data. Log at least 2 weight entries to see the chart.
body_progress.chart_stale: Chart based on the last recorded data. Update your weight to see the correct trend.
body_progress.fat_alert: Body fat has increased by more than 1.5% over the last two weeks. Consider reducing your caloric surplus to avoid excessive fat gain.
body_progress.composition_subtitle: Separates muscle from fat so your progress reflects real changes in body composition.
body_progress.weight_preview: Preview: BMI → {{ bmi }} · TDEE → {{ tdee }} kcal/day
body_progress.error_weight_positive: Weight must be a positive value greater than 0.
body_progress.error_weight_max: Please enter a valid weight (max 500 kg).
body_progress.error_goal_below_current: Goal weight must be lower than your current weight ({{ current }} kg).
body_progress.error_goal_below_min: Goal weight must be at least {{ min }} kg.
body_progress.goal_auto_set_desc: Based on a healthy BMI (24.9), we've set your goal weight to {{ weight }} kg. You can adjust it anytime.
body_progress.composition_hint: The system will estimate your body fat % using the US Navy method
body_progress.height_hint: Current height: {{ height }} cm · BMI is automatically recalculated
body_progress.goal_selection_subtitle: This determines your caloric strategy and macro distribution. You can change it later from your profile.
body_progress.tooltip_bmi: BMI (Body Mass Index) measures body fat based on your weight and height. It's a rough screening tool — not a diagnosis.
body_progress.tooltip_bmr: BMR (Basal Metabolic Rate) is the calories your body burns at complete rest — just to keep your organs running.
body_progress.tooltip_tdee: TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) is your total calorie burn per day, including physical activity. Your caloric target is based on this.
body_progress.tooltip_body_fat: Estimated body fat percentage calculated using the US Navy circumference method (waist and neck measurements).
body_progress.tooltip_lean_mass: Lean mass is your total body weight minus fat — it includes muscle, bone, organs, and water.
body_progress.tooltip_lean_bulk: Lean bulk means gaining muscle while keeping fat gain minimal (typically below 1.5% per cycle). It requires a moderate caloric surplus with high protein intake.
body_progress.stagnation_banner_loss: You've been logging consistently but your weight hasn't trended downward in this period. Consider reviewing your caloric deficit or nutrition quality.
body_progress.stagnation_banner_gain: You've been logging consistently but your weight hasn't trended upward in this period. Consider reviewing your caloric surplus or training load.
body_progress.error_save_failed: Could not save. Please try again.
body_progress.error_load_failed: Could not load data. Please try again.
body_progress.goal_lock_desc: You committed to this goal on {{date}}. You can switch goals in {{days}} days ({{unlockDate}}).
body_progress.goal_locked_switch_disabled: Goal locked — {{days}} days until you can switch
body_progress.goal_selection_locked_note: Your current goal is locked until {{unlockDate}}. Switching resets your metabolic cycle.
body_progress.goal_switch_confirm_desc: Switching to {{goal}} will start a new 28-day commitment and reset your metabolic progress cycle. Your weight history is preserved.
body_progress.history_subtitle: All entries for the current goal cycle
body_progress.history_empty: No weight entries yet for this goal cycle.
body_progress.error_already_logged_today: You already have an entry for today. It will be updated.

smart_scan.page_subtitle: Photograph a meal or restaurant menu to log instantly
smart_scan.paywall_title: Smart Scan requires Pro or Premium
smart_scan.paywall_desc: Analyze photos of food plates to log meals instantly. Available from $14.99/month.
smart_scan.plate_card_desc: Take or upload a photo of your dish to get an estimated nutritional breakdown
smart_scan.menu_card_desc: This option allows you to scan the menu of any restaurant you choose.
smart_scan.drop_hint: Drag & drop or use buttons below
smart_scan.api_source: Google Cloud Vision API · Open Food Facts
smart_scan.result_subtitle: Review and confirm items before logging
smart_scan.quantities_note: Quantities are estimated. Adjust if needed before confirming.
smart_scan.invalid_title: No food items could be detected
smart_scan.invalid_desc: The image may be blurry or doesn't contain recognizable food. Please try again or log manually.
smart_scan.menu_subtitle: Filtered by your restrictions · Ranked by compatibility with your remaining macros
smart_scan.impact_best_dish_note: Impact calculated for the recommended dish
smart_scan.impact_approaching: Will reach {{ percent }}% of your daily target
smart_scan.impact_exceeded: Will exceed your daily target ({{ percent }}%)

menu_dishes.hake_ceviche_justification: Covers 38g of your remaining protein target · Within your caloric budget · No restricted ingredients

pantry.page_subtitle: Manage your ingredients and get personalised recipe suggestions
pantry.empty_desc: Add ingredients to get personalised recipe suggestions based on what you have at home.
pantry.deficit_hint: Suggested recipes respect your remaining deficit
pantry.protein_hint: Remaining protein: {{ remaining }}g of {{ total }}g · Recipes ranked by protein content
pantry.recipes_title: Suggested recipes using what's in your cupboard
pantry.recipes_filtered_deficit: Filtered by your remaining calorie deficit of {{ kcal }} kcal
pantry.recipes_ranked_protein: Ranked by protein content · Covers your protein deficit
pantry.empty_recipes: Add at least one ingredient to see recipe suggestions.
pantry.no_matching_recipes: No recipes match your current ingredients. Try adding more.
pantry.recipe_impact_warning: Adding this reaches {{ percent }}% of your daily goal
pantry.recipe_impact_danger: Adding this exceeds your daily goal ({{ percent }}%)

my_plan.page_subtitle: Manage your plan and view your payment history
my_plan.downgrade_warning: You will lose access to the following features at the end of your billing cycle ({{ date }}):

analytics.weight_chart_no_data: Not enough weight data to display the chart.
analytics.adherence_no_data: No adherence history for this period.
analytics.behavioral_no_data: No behavioral events recorded for this period.
